history.note: Retail ASM applies no shard basis scale. Port ships field_10E0 scaled by visibility (bondview.c:16188, default on); Dam/Surface visibility=0.2. Correct shard scale = 1/visibility to net retail. Only flag #5 (INV_VIS_SCALE) inverts it; it is the current default. See docs/fidelity/derivations/FID-0003-glass-shard-scale.md
